mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, attendance_date, clock_in_time, clock_out_time, attendance_status, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}
SELECT id, employee_id, quota_month, total_count, used_count, assigned_by, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_makeup_quota WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND quota_month = #{quotaMonth}
